notes: Dev build with unstable features for CLI, MCP, and shipd via just build
Stable release build without unstable features via just build-release
Full test suite (Rust + web) via just test, with just test-rust and just test-web splits
File watcher rebuilds Rust on changes via just watch
Install dev binaries (ship + shipd) to ~/.local/bin via just install-dev
Rust clippy with unstable features and -D warnings via just lint
Rust formatting and format check via just fmt and just fmt-check
Build WASM compiler via wasm-pack for browser-side compilation
Start Studio dev server (Vite + local D1) via just dev
Rebuild, install, and hard-restart shipd via just daemon-restart
Apply D1 migrations locally and remotely via just db-migrate and just db-migrate-remote
Deploy Studio to Cloudflare Workers via just deploy
